data.title: What's Going On With Core Scientific Stock Today?
data.description: Core Scientific Inc (NASDAQ:CORZ) shares are trading higher. The company on Tuesday announced that CoreWeave exercised the final option of the previously announced hosting contract.

data.title: Why UP Fintech Holding (TIGR) Stock Is Falling
data.description: UP Fintech shares are trading lower by 8% Tuesday morning. The company announced a proposed follow-on public offering of 15 million American depository shares.

data.title: Gold On Track For Best Year Since 1979: Veteran Investor Says 'Sell Bonds, Buy Gold'
data.description: Gold is up 33% year-to-date, positioning for its strongest year since 1979. Veteran investor Ed Yardeni advises 'Sell Bonds, Buy Gold' amid rising yields and geopolitical risks.

data.title: Volkswagen Executive Deported From China After Positive Cannabis Test
Lockheed Martin Raises Annual EPS Guidance But Struggles With Sales; Stock Slips
data.description: LMT's Q3 results were mixed, with net sales missing consensus but adjusted EPS beating it. The company also raised its FY24 EPS outlook.
